summary: TWO_COLUMN: ValueTracker s morphs the coordinate grid from the standard basis (e₁, e₂) to a new basis (b₁=(2,1), b₂=(-1,1)) via always_redraw on grid lines/dots and basis arrows. The fixed yellow point v stays pinned at world (3, 2); only the coordinate ruler underneath changes. Right column has live b₁, b₂ values and the recomputed (c₁, c₂) coordinates of v in the current basis (solved via numpy.linalg).
